description: The chatConvIdRef pattern is used to prevent race conditions when switching conversations, but the check 'if (currentConvId !== chatConvIdRef.current && chatConvIdRef.current !== null)' could fail if currentConvId is updated between mutation start and success. Use a more robust approach: store a unique mutation ID per request and validate it in onSuccess.
successCriteria: chatMutation uses a unique ID per request to validate responses
Stale responses from old conversations are ignored reliably
No race conditions when rapidly switching conversations
